{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20849_1
|class_id=20849
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=collection@20849_2
|fame=17
|art=14
|fth=12
|civ=12
|tech=35
|ss1=prop@62417_2<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +2<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss2=prop@62417_2<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +4<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss3=prop@62417_2<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +6<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss4=prop@62417_2<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +6<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss7=prop@62417_2<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +6<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
